provenance_assertion: This file records observed-data provenance for the v0.3.1 somatic_ambient_anxiety scored release. Every release-blocking statistic in the approved Wave 1 dossier is bound to observed fielding dates, a restricted data digest, the frozen validation runner digest, the canonical observed results artifact digest, and signed statistic-level review.
